subcodes.first_line: O Nur! Hearken unto that which the Lord of Manifestation calleth thee unto. Verily, He draweth thee, teacheth thee, acquainteth thee, and leadeth thee unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نور ان استمع ما یدعوک به مالک الظهور انه یجذبک و یعلمک و یعرفک و یبلغک الی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
